executive_summary_zh: 今天候选源高度集中在 GitHub Copilot/VS Code 更新，真正有技术信号的是 VS Code 月度发布说明：它把“代理式开发”的几个关键基础设施公开化了，包括 Agents window、远程长会话、BYOK 扩展到隔离环境，以及 Agent Host Protocol。
对后端/平台负责人而言，这不是单纯产品功能堆叠，而是在逐步形成可治理的 agent runtime：会话状态同步、远端执行、模型路由、隔离模式与 Git 工作流耦合，说明企业级 AI coding 正在从聊天补全转向可持续运行的任务执行系统。
executive_summary_en: Today's candidate set is narrow and mostly GitHub Copilot changelog noise; the strongest technical signal is the VS Code monthly release note, which exposes core building blocks for agentic development: an Agents window, remote long-running sessions, BYOK in constrained environments, and the Agent Host Protocol.

For backend/platform leaders, this matters less as feature news and more as evidence of an emerging governable agent runtime: session state sync, remote execution, model routing, isolation modes, and tighter Git workflow integration are becoming first-class parts of enterprise AI coding systems.

items.title: GitHub Copilot in Visual Studio Code, May releases
items.summary_zh: 这篇月度更新最有价值的部分不是零散新功能，而是把 VS Code/Copilot 的 agent 执行面逐渐产品化：Agents window 进入 Stable 预览，支持跨项目任务导向操作；远程 agent 可通过 SSH 或 Dev Tunnels 在远端机器上持续运行；BYOK 扩展到 air-gapped 环境，并允许为不同辅助任务指定模型；同时继续推进 Agent Host Protocol，用于跨客户端同步 agent 会话状态。
items.summary_en: The important signal in this monthly release is not individual feature churn, but the productization of an agent execution surface inside VS Code/Copilot: the Agents window is now in Stable preview for task-oriented, multi-project work; remote agents can run over SSH or Dev Tunnels and continue when the client disconnects; BYOK now extends to air-gapped environments with model controls for utility tasks; and GitHub is continuing investment in the Agent Host Protocol for synchronizing agent session state across clients.
items.why_it_matters_zh: 这说明 IDE 内的 AI coding 正在从“本地交互式助手”演进为“可托管、可远程、可同步、可治理”的 agent 系统。对平台团队来说，AHP、远程会话和 BYOK/隔离能力比单个模型升级更关键，因为它们直接决定企业是否能把 agent 接入内网、受控执行环境和现有开发治理流程。
items.why_it_matters_en: This shows AI coding in the IDE moving from a local interactive assistant to a managed, remote-capable, stateful, and governable agent system. For platform teams, AHP, remote sessions, and BYOK/isolation features matter more than model swaps because they determine whether agents can operate inside enterprise networks, controlled execution environments, and existing engineering governance.
key_takeaways_zh: Agents window 把任务执行、跨项目导航和变更审查整合成 agent-first 工作台，意味着 IDE 正在重新围绕代理工作流设计。
远程 agent 与断线后继续运行的能力，指向长期任务、后台执行和更接近 CI/开发容器的执行模型。
BYOK 进入 air-gapped 环境并支持按任务路由模型，反映企业部署对合规、成本与模型控制的要求正在成为核心能力。
Agent Host Protocol 是最值得跟踪的底层信号之一：它可能成为多客户端、多宿主之间共享 agent 会话状态的关键接口层。
key_takeaways_en: The Agents window consolidates task execution, multi-project navigation, and change review into an agent-first workspace, signaling IDE redesign around agent workflows.
Remote agents plus disconnected session continuity point toward long-running tasks, background execution, and a model closer to CI/dev container execution than local chat.
BYOK in air-gapped environments with per-task model routing reflects rising enterprise demand for compliance, cost control, and model governance.
Agent Host Protocol is the most important lower-level signal to track: it could become the interface layer for sharing agent session state across clients and hosts.

top_items: GitHub Copilot in Visual Studio Code, May releases
new_terms_zh: Agent Host Protocol (AHP)：用于在多个客户端之间同步代理会话状态的开放协议方向。
BYOK in air-gapped environments：在隔离/内网环境中使用自带模型密钥的企业部署模式。
Remote agents：通过 SSH 或 Dev Tunnels 在远端机器持续运行的编码代理会话。
new_terms_en: Agent Host Protocol (AHP): an open protocol direction for synchronizing agent session state across multiple clients.
BYOK in air-gapped environments: an enterprise deployment mode where teams use their own model keys inside isolated networks.
Remote agents: coding agent sessions that run persistently on remote machines over SSH or Dev Tunnels.
themes_zh: AI coding 从聊天式补全转向任务式、长会话、远程执行的 agent runtime。
企业采用的关键约束正从模型能力转向协议、隔离、会话持久化和治理控制。
IDE、远程宿主与 Git 工作流正在被整合为统一的代理执行面。
themes_en: AI coding is moving from chat-style assistance to task-oriented, long-running, remote-executed agent runtimes.
Enterprise adoption constraints are shifting from raw model quality to protocol design, isolation, session persistence, and governance.
The IDE, remote host, and Git workflow are being fused into a unified agent execution surface.
implications_zh: 如果你在建设内部编码代理平台，应优先评估会话状态模型、远程执行宿主、断线恢复以及与 Git/代码评审的耦合点，而不是只比较模型排行榜。
需要尽早定义模型路由与权限边界：哪些任务可走外部模型，哪些必须在内网/沙箱执行。
值得持续关注 AHP 或类似协议是否开放成熟，因为这会影响多 IDE、CLI、Web 端统一代理体验的可行性。
implications_en: If you are building an internal coding-agent platform, prioritize session state architecture, remote execution hosts, disconnect recovery, and Git/code-review integration over model leaderboard comparisons.
Model routing and permission boundaries need to be defined early: which tasks may use external models, and which must run in internal or sandboxed environments.
Track whether AHP or similar protocols mature openly, since that will shape the feasibility of a unified agent experience across IDE, CLI, and web surfaces.
reading_order: GitHub Copilot in Visual Studio Code, May releases
what_to_ignore_zh: GitHub Changelog 首页与月度归档页只是聚合入口，信息重复且缺少额外技术细节。
本轮候选里其余内容基本属于产品发布流，不足以单独进入高信号摘要。
what_to_ignore_en: The GitHub Changelog homepage and monthly archive are just aggregation pages with duplicated information and no added technical detail.
The rest of this candidate set is mostly product-release stream noise and does not justify separate inclusion in a high-signal digest.
